scripts.test:capture: uv run python cli.py test capture
scripts.test:audio: uv run python cli.py test audio
scripts.test:web: uv run python cli.py test web
scripts.lint: uv run ruff check src/ capture/src/ audio/src/ cli.py
scripts.lint:fix: uv run ruff check src/ capture/src/ audio/src/ cli.py --fix
